panels.description: Complete pipeline analysis: Pipeline 0, Pipeline 1 = main pipelines; INTER = inter-pipeline connectors showing which pipelines they connect (From → To)
panels.title: Pipeline Analysis - All Communicators with Pipeline Assignments

panels.description: Quick summary: Communicators with ≥4 GPUs are pipelines, 2-3 GPUs are inter-pipeline connectors
panels.title: Pipeline Summary

panels.description: Average bytes per collective operation in the last interval. Shows real-time payload size for each collective (AllReduce, Broadcast, etc.).
panels.title: Collective Operation - Average Bytes

panels.description: Average total time per collective operation in the last interval (from Collective START to last ProxyOp STOP).
panels.title: Collective Operation - Average Time

panels.description: Average number of ProxyStep transfers per collective operation in the last interval.
panels.title: Collective Operation - Number of Transfers

panels.description: Throughput calculated from collective bytes and time in the last interval. Includes all overhead.
panels.title: Collective Operation - Effective Throughput

panels.description: Rate of collective bytes transferred per second. Calculated using rate() function on collective bytes counter.
panels.title: Collective Operation - Bytes per Second

panels.description: Rate of collective operations per second. Calculated using rate() function on collective count histogram sum.
panels.title: Collective Operation - Operations per Second

panels.description: Average size of individual ProxyStep transfers within collectives in the last interval. Real-time data chunk size.
panels.title: Collective - Average Transfer Size

panels.description: Average time for individual ProxyStep transfers in the last interval (from SendWait to ProxyStep STOP).
panels.title: Collective - Average Transfer Time

panels.description: Average bytes per P2P operation between pipelines. Shows data movement between pipeline stages with source/destination pipeline and rank info.
panels.title: P2P Operation - Average Bytes

panels.description: Average time per P2P operation between pipelines (from P2P operation START to last ProxyOp STOP).
panels.title: P2P Operation - Average Time

panels.description: Average number of ProxyStep transfers per P2P operation between pipelines.
panels.title: P2P Operation - Number of Transfers

panels.description: Throughput calculated from P2P bytes and time between pipelines. Includes all overhead.
panels.title: P2P Operation - Effective Throughput

panels.description: Average size of individual ProxyStep transfers within P2P operations between pipelines.
panels.title: P2P Operation - Average Transfer Size

panels.description: Average time for individual ProxyStep transfers within P2P operations between pipelines.
panels.title: P2P Operation - Average Transfer Time

panels.description: Rate of bytes transferred from source rank to destination rank in the last interval.
panels.title: Rank-to-Rank Transfer Rate

panels.description: Computed transfer rate based on active transfer time in the last interval. Pure data transfer bandwidth.
panels.title: Rank-to-Rank Bandwidth

panels.description: Computed latency via linear regression in the last interval (y-intercept). Fixed overhead time for 0-byte transfer.
panels.title: Rank-to-Rank Latency

panels.description: Average transfer size per communicator, rank pair, and channel in the last interval.
panels.title: Per-Channel Transfer Size

panels.description: Average transfer time per communicator, rank pair, and channel in the last interval.
panels.title: Per-Channel Transfer Time

panels.description: Computed latency per channel via linear regression in the last interval.
panels.title: Per-Channel Latency

panels.description: Compares effective throughput vs pure data transfer bandwidth in the last interval.
panels.title: Comparison: Effective vs Pure Bandwidth

panels.description: Shows which Pipeline each rank belongs to. Global Rank is the NCCL rank value. Rows are grouped by Pipeline ID.
panels.title: Rank Mapping Table
